PersonaImport.followUpInterviewDescription: 基于分析结果进行深度补充访谈

personaImportClient.title: Persona Management
personaImportClient.subtitle: Import interview records, analyze completeness, and generate interactive personas for your research and analysis needs.
personaImportClient.importDescription: Upload PDF interview records and convert them to structured, LLM-compatible format
personaImportClient.chatDescription: Interact with generated personas based on your interview data
personaImportClient.researchDescription: Advanced research tools and analytics powered by persona data
personaImportClient.dimensionsDescription: Our system evaluates interview completeness across four key socio-psychological dimensions
personaImportClient.demographicDescription: Social identity and growth trajectory analysis including age, education, occupation, and background.
personaImportClient.psychologicalDescription: Personality traits, emotional patterns, and internal motivations reflected in behavior.
personaImportClient.behavioralDescription: Consumer behavior, decision preferences, and social influence patterns.
personaImportClient.politicalDescription: Cultural stance, information trust structures, and community belonging analysis.
personaImportClient.gettingStartedDescription: Follow these simple steps to create your first persona
personaImportClient.step1Description: Start by uploading a PDF containing your interview transcripts or records.
personaImportClient.step2Description: Examine the completeness scores and identify areas that need additional information.
personaImportClient.step3Description: Create an interactive persona and start chatting with it to validate insights.
personaImportClient.step4Description: Deploy personas in advanced research scenarios and analytics workflows.

personas.title: My Personas
personas.subtitle: Manage and interact with your generated personas
personas.createNewPersonas: Create new personas from interview data

followUpInterview.thankYou: 感谢您参与此次访谈会话。您的回答已被记录并将用于研究目的。
followUpInterview.summaryNote: 访谈摘要和分析将很快提供给研究人员。

import.title: 智能人格画像生成
import.progressDescription: AI 正在分析您的访谈内容并生成人格画像
import.fileInfoDescription: 查看原始文件或重新进行分析
import.confirmReanalyze: 确定要重新分析吗？这将覆盖现有的分析结果。
import.reanalyzeStarted: 重新分析已开始，请稍候...

analysisResult.title: 完整性分析结果
analysisResult.description: 基于四大社会心理维度的结构化分析与评分，评估信息完备度
analysisResult.excellentCoverage: 各维度覆盖度优秀，信息全面深入
analysisResult.goodCoverage: 覆盖度良好，部分维度可进一步优化
analysisResult.baselineCoverage: 覆盖度达到基准线，需要重点补充关键信息
analysisResult.belowBaseline: 覆盖度低于基准线，需要大量补充各维度信息
